label: Strategy Harness Build
description: Build completed-market packets, role reports, and decision artifacts for a completed or partially completed live round.

inputs.name: round-dir
inputs.description: Path to the strategy harness round directory.

outputs.name: market_packets
outputs.description: Market-level packets with status, strategy, execution, and review evidence.

outputs.name: role_reports
outputs.description: Role-specific reports for Lead, Live Ops, Execution, Data Quality, Backtest Parity, and Critic/Gate.

failureModes.description: The round is still running or post-live artifacts are incomplete.
Order lifecycle evidence is missing or partial.

evidencePolicy: Build artifacts are decision evidence only after freshness and completeness are checked.
Partial build artifacts can create follow-up tasks but cannot promote a strategy.
Backtest optimism is expected; classify live/backtest divergence before deciding.
notes: This is the main adapter entry point after a bounded live round ends.
